purpose: Compatibility evidence for rebuilt M7 custody modules. Bytecode is compatibility evidence, NOT authority — North Star invariants override recovered API behavior.

public_dataclasses.name: CustodyTargetKey
public_dataclasses.description: Immutable key identifying the exact custody target for an action.

public_dataclasses.name: RepairOccurrenceKey
public_dataclasses.description: Immutable key identifying a specific repair occurrence (F01 tuple + fence + chain identity).

public_dataclasses.name: CustodyLease
public_dataclasses.description: Attempt-scoped custody lease with epoch, owner, fence, expiry.

public_dataclasses.name: CustodyLeaseEvent
public_dataclasses.description: Append-only custody lease event for the event-sourced lease store.

public_functions.name: process_birth_identity
public_functions.description: Return current process-birth identity: hostname, pid, boot time.

public_functions.name: target_digest
public_functions.description: SHA-256 digest over canonical target dict.

public_functions.name: occurrence_digest
public_functions.signature: (f01_fields: dict, fence_token: str, chain_identity: str) -> str
public_functions.description: SHA-256 digest over F01 tuple, fence token, and chain identity.

public_functions.name: normalize_custody_target_key
public_functions.description: Return canonical CustodyTargetKey or None for invalid inputs.

public_functions.name: build_custody_target_key
public_functions.description: Build a CustodyTargetKey from kwargs; returns None if any required field is empty.

public_functions.name: normalize_repair_occurrence_key
public_functions.description: Return canonical RepairOccurrenceKey or None for invalid inputs.

public_functions.name: build_repair_occurrence_key
public_functions.description: Build a RepairOccurrenceKey; returns None if required fields are empty.

public_functions.name: normalize_custody_lease
public_functions.description: Return canonical CustodyLease or None for invalid inputs.

public_functions.name: normalize_custody_lease_event
public_functions.description: Return canonical CustodyLeaseEvent or None for invalid inputs.

public_dataclasses.name: CustodyLeaseStore
public_dataclasses.description: Event-sourced custody lease store with atomic append, idempotency, and quarantine.

public_functions.name: default_lease_store_dir
public_functions.description: Return default custody lease-store directory (~/.megaplan/custody/leases).

public_functions.name: reduce_event
public_functions.signature: (current: CustodyLease | None, event: CustodyLeaseEvent) -> CustodyLease | None
public_functions.description: Apply a single event to current lease state, returning new state.

public_functions.name: replay_events
public_functions.description: Deterministically replay events to compute current lease.

public_functions.name: open_lease_store
public_functions.description: Open a custody lease store rooted at base_dir.

public_functions.name: record_events
public_functions.description: Record a batch of events in sequence order.

public_dataclasses.name: ActionBoundaryContext
public_dataclasses.description: Context for action boundary validation.

public_dataclasses.name: ActionBoundaryResult
public_dataclasses.description: Full action boundary validation result.

public_functions.name: validate_action_boundary
public_functions.description: Validate action boundary: rereads grant/fence/lease/epoch/WBC attempt immediately. Returns ActionBoundaryResult; callers must test result.authorized.

public_functions.name: production_enforcement_enabled
public_functions.description: Return True when ARNOLD_M7_ACTION_VALIDATOR_ENFORCEMENT env var is active.

public_functions.name: validate_action_boundary_simple
public_functions.description: Convenience wrapper for validate_action_boundary with default store setup.

public_dataclasses.name: ControlledWriter
public_dataclasses.description: Controlled writer registration entry.

public_dataclasses.name: WriteGuardResult
public_dataclasses.description: Result of writer guard check.

public_functions.name: get_writer
public_functions.description: Look up a controlled writer by its stable id.

public_functions.name: get_writer_by_surface
public_functions.description: Look up a controlled writer by its surface name.

public_functions.name: list_writers
public_functions.description: Return all registered controlled writers, optionally filtered by cohort.

public_functions.name: list_active_writers
public_functions.description: Return writers in the active cohort.

public_functions.name: list_shadow_writers
public_functions.description: Return writers in the shadow cohort.

public_functions.name: list_report_only_writers
public_functions.description: Return writers in the report_only cohort.

public_functions.name: list_authority_increasing_writers
public_functions.description: Return all registered writers that gate authority-increasing operations.

public_functions.name: writer_guard
public_functions.signature: (writer_id: str = '', surface_name: str = '', override_enforcement=None, override_fail_closed=None) -> WriteGuardResult
public_functions.description: Single entry-point for all Custody-gated production writes. Fail-closed.

public_functions.name: guard_all
public_functions.description: Run writer_guard against every writer in writer_ids (or all registered if empty).

public_dataclasses.name: OccurrenceWriterTerminalProvenanceMap
public_dataclasses.description: Deterministic M7 provenance map joining writer surfaces to occurrence/terminal evidence.

public_functions.name: generate_writer_map
public_functions.description: Generate the deterministic M7 provenance map, writing JSON atomically if output_path given.

public_dataclasses.name: CanaryCheck
public_dataclasses.description: A single canary check result.

public_dataclasses.name: PromotionGateContext
public_dataclasses.description: Context for promotion gate validation.

public_dataclasses.name: PromotionGateResult
public_dataclasses.description: Full promotion gate validation result.

public_functions.name: validate_promotion_gate
public_functions.signature: (context: PromotionGateContext, lease_store=None, outbox=None, projection_store=None, provenance_source=None, expected_source_digest=None, enforcement_enabled=None) -> PromotionGateResult
public_functions.description: Validate promotion gate: source provenance, run authority, custody lease, WBC attempt.

public_functions.name: validate_promotion_gate_simple
public_functions.signature: (projection_id, target, run_authority_grant_id, coordinator_fence_token, source_path=None, wbc_attempt_reference=None, **store_dirs) -> PromotionGateResult
public_functions.description: Convenience wrapper for validate_promotion_gate.

public_functions.name: canary_enforcement_enabled
public_functions.description: Return True when ARNOLD_M7_CANARY_ENFORCEMENT is active.

public_dataclasses.name: ReaderCompatibility
public_dataclasses.description: Registration of a historical compatibility reader.

public_dataclasses.name: CompatibilitySnapshot
public_dataclasses.description: Point-in-time compatibility snapshot for audit and diagnostics.

public_dataclasses.name: RollbackValidation
public_dataclasses.description: Rollback safety validation result.

public_functions.name: get_reader
public_functions.description: Look up a registered reader by stable id.

public_functions.name: list_readers
public_functions.signature: (mode: CompatibilityMode | None = None, deadline: DeadlineMilestone | None = None) -> list[ReaderCompatibility]
public_functions.description: List registered readers, optionally filtered.

public_functions.name: list_expired_readers
public_functions.description: Return readers whose compatibility has expired.

public_functions.name: list_expiring_readers
public_functions.description: Return readers approaching their compatibility deadline.

public_functions.name: check_reader_compatibility
public_functions.description: Check whether a reader is compatible under current mode.

public_functions.name: get_mode
public_functions.description: Return current compatibility mode.

public_functions.name: is_production_enforcement_enabled
public_functions.description: Return True when M7 production enforcement is enabled.

public_functions.name: validate_rollback_safety
public_functions.description: Validate that a rollback is safe.

public_functions.name: snapshot
public_functions.description: Generate a point-in-time compatibility snapshot for audit/diagnostics.

public_dataclasses.name: OutboxRecord
public_dataclasses.description: Append-only custody outbox record.

public_dataclasses.name: DeadLetterRecord
public_dataclasses.description: Dead-lettered outbox record after reconciliation failure.

public_dataclasses.name: ReconciliationResult
public_dataclasses.description: Result of reconciling an outbox record.

public_dataclasses.name: CustodyOutbox
public_dataclasses.description: Durable custody outbox for evidence reconciliation.

public_functions.name: reconcile_outbox_record
public_functions.signature: (outbox: CustodyOutbox, record: OutboxRecord, lease_store=None, wbc_attempt_reader=None, run_authority_reader=None) -> tuple[OutboxRecord, tuple[ReconciliationResult, ...]]
public_functions.description: Reconcile an outbox record by rereading source records.

public_functions.name: reconcile_all_pending
public_functions.description: Reconcile all pending outbox records.

public_functions.name: open_outbox
public_functions.description: Open custody outbox store rooted at base_dir.

public_functions.name: build_outbox_record_from_event
public_functions.description: Build outbox record from custody lease event.

public_dataclasses.name: CustodyProjectionStore
public_dataclasses.description: Projection store for custody-related materialized views.

public_functions.name: open_projection_store
public_functions.description: Open custody projection store rooted at base_dir.

public_functions.name: append_events
public_functions.signature: (store: CustodyProjectionStore, projection_id: str, events: Sequence[tuple[str, dict]]) -> Sequence[dict]
public_functions.description: Append a batch of projection events in sequence.

public_dataclasses.name: RepairReceipt
public_dataclasses.description: Immutable repair receipt with idempotent digest.

public_functions.name: compute_receipt_digest
public_functions.description: Compute deterministic SHA-256 content address of a receipt.

public_functions.name: build_repair_receipt
public_functions.description: Build repair receipt from kwargs; returns None if required fields missing.

public_functions.name: normalize_repair_receipt
public_functions.description: Return canonical RepairReceipt or None for invalid inputs.

public_functions.name: review_receipt
public_functions.description: Transition receipt through review without altering attempt evidence.

public_functions.name: rework_receipt
public_functions.description: Create rework receipt with updated evidence.

public_functions.name: supersede_receipt
public_functions.description: Mark receipt as superseded by a later one (terminal status).

public_functions.name: is_same_attempt_evidence
public_functions.description: Return True if two receipts carry byte-identical attempt evidence.

north_star_overrides_note: Bytecode-derived interfaces are compatibility evidence only. North Star invariants (WBC records never grant/lease authority, Run Authority does not store custody leases, Custody does not accept receipts as grants) override any recovered behavior that would authorize from derived state or best-effort receipts.
